ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset class */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset class (e.g., Stocks, Cash) */,
  "weighting" REAL /* Percentage weighting of the asset class in the portfolio */,
  "return_low" REAL /* Minimum expected return for the asset class */,
  "return_high" REAL /* Maximum expected return for the asset class */,
  "finsx_percent_rank" REAL /* Percentile rank of the asset class compared to others in the same category */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., stocks, bonds, real estate) */,
  "asset_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the asset class */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Measure of the asset's price fluctuations */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark for the asset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the asset's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio manager responsible for the portfolio */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client owning the portfolio */,
  "investment_goal" TEXT /* Primary investment goal of the portfolio */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Client's risk tolerance level */,
  "asset_allocation_strategy" TEXT /* Strategy used for asset allocation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_assets" (
  "portfolio_asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio-asset relationship */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio containing the asset */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset class in the portfolio */,
  "allocation_percentage" REAL /* Percentage allocation of the asset in the portfolio */,
  "target_allocation" REAL /* Target percentage allocation for the asset */,
  "current_allocation" REAL /* Current percentage allocation for the asset */,
  "deviation" REAL /* Difference between target and current allocation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the allocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_assets_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_assets_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the investment manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the manager has been in the industry */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Performance rating based on past performance */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Manager's area of expertise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance report */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance report */,
  "return_percentage" REAL /* Percentage return of the portfolio */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the portfolio (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "benchmark_return" REAL /* Return of the benchmark for the same period */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Excess return of the portfolio compared to the benchmark */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Measure of risk-adjusted return */,
  "value_at_risk" REAL /* Measure of potential loss under normal market conditions */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, manager, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view portfolio, generate report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
